title: Chain 1/8: Walk-in Wait
scene: 你没预约直接走进理发店。（对话链：理发美容）

turns.en: Do you have an appointment?
No. How long is the wait?

turns.cn: 大概二十分钟，您先坐一下。
turns.en: About twenty minutes. Please have a seat.
Sure. Please call me when it's my turn.
May I have your phone number?
Five five five, zero one two three. Thanks.

title: Chain 2/8: Describe Haircut
scene: 发型师开始给你剪头发。（对话链：理发美容）

turns.en: What would you like done today?

turns.cn: 稍微修短一点，两边推短。
turns.en: Just a trim, shorter on the sides.
How long do you want the bangs?

turns.cn: 盖过眉毛就好，不要太短。
turns.en: Just past my eyebrows, not too short.
Would you like a shampoo? It's five extra.
Yes, please.

title: Chain 3/8: Check the Result
scene: 剪完发型师让你看镜子。（对话链：理发美容）

turns.en: How does that look?

turns.cn: 整体不错，右边还能再短一点吗？
turns.en: Overall good. Can the right side be a bit shorter?
No problem. I'll fix that.
That's perfect.
Want a little styling wax?
Just a light touch.

title: Chain 4/8: Ask About Color
scene: 你想下次染发，先咨询价格和流程。（对话链：理发美容）

turns.cn: 我想染成深棕色，自然一点。
turns.en: I'd like to dye my hair dark brown, something natural.

turns.cn: 您现在发色偏黑，可能需要漂浅。
turns.en: Your hair is quite dark now. We may need to lighten it first.
Will bleaching damage my hair?

turns.cn: 会有损伤，做完护理会好一些。
turns.en: Some damage is possible, but a treatment helps.

turns.cn: 大概要多长时间？多少钱？
turns.en: How long will it take, and how much?

turns.cn: 三小时，一百二十美元起。
turns.en: About three hours, starting at a hundred twenty dollars.

title: Chain 5/8: Nail Service
scene: 剪完发，你在店里顺便做指甲。（对话链：理发美容）

turns.cn: 您想做哪种？美甲还是光疗？
turns.en: What would you like? Regular polish or gel?
Gel, please. A light pink color.

turns.cn: 需要修甲型吗？方形还是圆形？
turns.en: Would you like a shape? Square or round?
Round, and not too long.

turns.cn: 光疗照灯后会保持两周。
turns.en: After curing, gel lasts about two weeks.

turns.cn: 卸的时候也是在这里吗？
turns.en: Do I come back here to remove it?

title: Chain 6/8: Pay and Tip
scene: 服务结束，你到前台结账。（对话链：理发美容）

turns.cn: 剪发三十五，光疗四十五，一共八十。
turns.en: Thirty-five for the cut, forty-five for gel. Eighty total.
Card, please. Can I tip them separately?
Yes. Enter amounts here.
Fifteen for the stylist, ten for nails.
Thank you. Book next time for less wait.

title: Chain 7/8: Wrong Cut Fix
scene: 回家发现刘海剪太短，你打电话店里。（对话链：理发美容）

turns.cn: 我是下午那位，刘海好像比说的短了。
turns.en: I was in this afternoon. The bangs seem shorter than we agreed.

turns.cn: 非常抱歉，您方便明天来我帮您修？
turns.en: I'm sorry. Can you come in tomorrow? I'll fix it free.
Tomorrow noon work?

turns.cn: 十二点可以，我留时间给您。
turns.en: Noon works. I'll reserve time for you.
Okay. Thank you.

title: Chain 8/8: Book Next Visit
scene: 修好后你预约下次剪发和染发。（对话链：理发美容）

turns.cn: 想约下个月染发加剪发，周六上午。
turns.en: I'd like color and a cut next month, Saturday morning.

turns.cn: 十点有位，大概三小时，要吗？
turns.en: Ten AM is open. About three hours total. Want it?

turns.cn: 要，还是找今天这位发型师。
turns.en: Yes. Same stylist as today.

turns.cn: 记下了，提前一天可改期。
turns.en: Booked. You can reschedule up to one day before.
Great. Thanks.
